top_signals.title: Ryanair Sees European Airline ‘Casualties’ on Jet Fuel Spike
top_signals.summary: Ryanair Holdings Plc Chief Executive Officer Michael O’Leary said there will be corporate “casualties” among European airlines if the Iran war continues and the Strait of Hormuz remains restricted.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ohio man sentenced to 9 years for running $10 million crypto Ponzi scheme
top_signals.summary: The CFTC filed an enforcement action against Rathnakishore Giri in August 2022 for running the fraudulent investment scheme.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
